Defines RTC backup register mappings for boot and reboot information.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines a set of preprocessor macros for backup data registers used in a real-time clock (RTC) system. Each macro associates a descriptive name with a specific RTC backup data register, such as `RTC_BKP_DR0` through `RTC_BKP_DR19`. These macros are used to store and retrieve various system states and diagnostic information, such as boot status, bootloader version, current time, and reboot reasons. The file uses `#pragma once` to prevent multiple inclusions during compilation. This setup facilitates the management of system state information across reboots and assists in debugging by providing a structured way to access specific data points.
